function_explanation: 该FFN算子提供MoeFFN和FFN的计算功能。在没有专家分组（expertTokens为空）时是FFN，有专家分组时是MoeFFN，统称为FFN，属于Moe结构。
product_support: Atlas A2 训练系列产品/Atlas A2 推理系列产品
Atlas 推理系列加速卡产品
function_signature: aclnnStatus aclnnFFNV3GetWorkspaceSize(const aclTensor* x, const aclTensor* weight1, const aclTensor* weight2, const aclTensor* expertTokensOptional, const aclTensor* bias1Optional, const aclTensor* bias2Optional, const aclTensor* scaleOptional, const aclTensor* offsetOptional, const aclTensor* deqScale1Optional, const aclTensor* deqScale2Optional, const aclTensor* antiquantScale1Optional, const aclTensor* antiquantScale2Optional, const aclTensor* antiquantOffset1Optional, const aclTensor* antiquantOffset2Optional, const char* activation, int64_t innerPrecise, bool tokensIndexFlag, const aclTensor* y, uint64_t* workspaceSize, aclOpExecutor** executor)

x.description: 计算输入，公式中的输入x。

dimensions.src_text: 支持输入的维度最少是2维，最多是8维。

weight1.description: 专家的权重数据，公式中的W1。

dimensions.src_text: 有专家[E, K1, N1]；无专家[K1, N1]

weight2.description: 专家的权重数据，公式中的W2。

dimensions.src_text: 有专家[E, K2, N2]；无专家[K2, N2]

bias1Optional.description: 权重数据修正值，公式中的b1。

bias2Optional.description: 权重数据修正值，公式中的b2。

scaleOptional.description: 量化参数，量化缩放系数。

dimensions.src_text: per-tensor下输入在有/无专家时均为一维向量，输入元素个数在有/无专家时分别为[E]/[1]；per-channel下输入在有/无专家时为二维向量/一维向量，输入元素个数在有/无专家时分别为[E, N1]/[N1]
一维向量，输入元素个数在有/无专家时分别为[E]/[1]

deqScale1Optional.description: 量化参数，第一个matmul的反量化缩放系数。

dimensions.src_text: 输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N1]/[N1]

deqScale2Optional.description: 量化参数，第二个matmul的反量化缩放系数。

dimensions.src_text: 输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N2]/[N2]

antiquantScale1Optional.description: 伪量化参数，第一个matmul的缩放系数。

dimensions.src_text: per-channel下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N1]/[N1]；per-group下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, G, N1]/[G, N1]

antiquantScale2Optional.description: 伪量化参数，第二个matmul的缩放系数。

dimensions.src_text: per-channel下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N2]/[N2]；per-group下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, G, N2]/[G, N2]

antiquantOffset1Optional.description: 伪量化参数，第一个matmul的偏移量。

dimensions.src_text: per-channel下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N1]/[N1]；per-group下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, G, N1]/[G, N1]

antiquantOffset2Optional.description: 伪量化参数，第二个matmul的偏移量。

dimensions.src_text: per-channel下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N2]/[N2]；per-group下输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, G, N2]/[G, N2]

activation.description: 代表使用的激活函数，公式中的activation。

innerPrecise.description: 表示高精度或者高性能选择。

allowed_range_value.src_text: innerPrecise为0时，代表开启高精度模式；innerPrecise为1时，代表高性能模式。

M.description: token个数，对应transform中的BS（B：Batch，表示输入样本批量大小。S：Seq-Length，表示输入样本序列长度）。

K1.description: 第一个matmul的输入通道数，对应transform中的H（Head-Size，表示隐藏层的大小）。

N2.description: 第二个matmul的输出通道数，对应transform中的H。

constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 所有场景下需满足K1=N2
M轴在32Byte对齐后小于INT32的最大值
x的shape为[M, K1]，M对应shape第0维
x的shape为[M, K1]，最后一维对应K1
输出维度与x一致，y的shape为[M, N2]
输出维度与x一致，y为2维
有专家[E, K1, N1]；无专家[K1, N1]
有专家[E, K2, N2]；无专家[K2, N2]
weight1和weight2必须同为有专家或同为无专家模式

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (bias1Optional is None) or ((bias1Optional.shape == [N1.range_value]) if (len(weight1.shape) == 2) else (bias1Optional.shape == [E.range_value, N1.range_value]))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: bias1有专家[E, N1]；无专家[N1]

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (bias2Optional is None) or ((bias2Optional.shape == [N2.range_value]) if (len(weight2.shape) == 2) else (bias2Optional.shape == [E.range_value, N2.range_value]))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: bias2有专家[E, N2]；无专家[N2]

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (deqScale1Optional is None) or ((deqScale1Optional.shape == [N1.range_value]) if (len(weight1.shape) == 2) else (deqScale1Optional.shape == [E.range_value, N1.range_value]))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: deqScale1输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N1]/[N1]

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (deqScale2Optional is None) or ((deqScale2Optional.shape == [N2.range_value]) if (len(weight2.shape) == 2) else (deqScale2Optional.shape == [E.range_value, N2.range_value]))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: deqScale2输入在有/无专家时分别为[E, N2]/[N2]
per-tensor下scale为[1]，per-channel下scale按专家模式变化
offset一维向量，per-tensor无专家时为[1]
激活层为gelu/fastgelu/relu/silu时，支持有专家或无专家分组，且N1=K2
激活层为geglu/swiglu/reglu时，N1=2*K2
激活层为geglu/swiglu/reglu时，仅支持无专家分组时的FLOAT16高性能场景
激活层为geglu/swiglu/reglu时，仅支持高性能场景

constraints_in_parameters.expr: not(activation.range_value in ["geglu","swiglu","reglu"]) or (x.dtype == "FLOAT16" and weight1.dtype == "FLOAT16" and weight2.dtype == "FLOAT16" and y.dtype == "FLOAT16")
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 激活层为geglu/swiglu/reglu时，仅支持FLOAT16场景

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (deqScale1Optional is None) or (deqScale2Optional is None) or (deqScale1Optional.dtype == deqScale2Optional.dtype)
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 要求deqScale1Optional与deqScale2Optional的数据类型保持一致
当weight1的数据类型为INT4时，其shape最后一维必须为偶数
当weight2的数据类型为INT4时，其shape最后一维必须为偶数

constraints_in_parameters.expr: not(x.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and scaleOptional is None and antiquantScale1Optional is None) or (innerPrecise.range_value == 0)
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: innerPrecise参数在BFLOAT16非量化场景，只能配置为0
innerPrecise取值为0（高精度）或1（高性能）
当前支持fastgelu/gelu/relu/silu以及geglu/swiglu/reglu

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (expertTokensOptional is None) or (expertTokensOptional.shape[0] == E.range_value and expertTokensOptional.shape[0] <= 256)
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: expertTokens为1维，最大长度256，元素个数为E
有专家时，专家数据的总数需要与x的M保持一致

constraints_in_parameters.expr: not((scaleOptional is not None or offsetOptional is not None or deqScale1Optional is not None or deqScale2Optional is not None) and (antiquantScale1Optional is not None or antiquantScale2Optional is not None or antiquantOffset1Optional is not None or antiquantOffset2Optional is not None))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 非量化场景不能输入量化参数和伪量化参数，量化场景不能输入伪量化参数，伪量化场景不能输入量化参数

constraints_in_parameters.expr: not(scaleOptional is not None and offsetOptional is not None) or (x.dtype == "INT8" and weight1.dtype == "INT8" and (bias1Optional is None or bias1Optional.dtype == "INT32") and (bias2Optional is None or bias2Optional.dtype == "INT32") and scaleOptional.dtype == "FLOAT32" and offsetOptional.dtype == "FLOAT32")
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 量化场景参数类型：x为INT8、weight为INT8、biasOptional为INT32、scaleOptional为FLOAT32、offsetOptional为FLOAT32

constraints_in_parameters.expr: not(antiquantScale1Optional is not None and antiquantScale2Optional is not None) or ((y.dtype == "FLOAT16" and x.dtype == "FLOAT16" and (bias1Optional is None or bias1Optional.dtype == "FLOAT16") and (bias2Optional is None or bias2Optional.dtype == "FLOAT16") and antiquantScale1Optional.dtype == "FLOAT16" and antiquantOffset1Optional.dtype == "FLOAT16" and antiquantScale2Optional.dtype == "FLOAT16" and antiquantOffset2Optional.dtype == "FLOAT16" and weight1.dtype in ["INT8","INT4"]) or (y.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and x.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and (bias1Optional is None or bias1Optional.dtype == "FLOAT32") and (bias2Optional is None or bias2Optional.dtype == "FLOAT32") and antiquantScale1Optional.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and antiquantOffset1Optional.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and antiquantScale2Optional.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and antiquantOffset2Optional.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and weight1.dtype in ["INT8","INT4"]))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 伪量化场景参数类型：y为FLOAT16时x/bias/antiquantScale/antiquantOffset均为FLOAT16，weight为INT8/INT4；y为BFLOAT16时x为BFLOAT16、bias为FLOAT32、antiquantScale/antiquantOffset为BFLOAT16，weight为INT8/INT4

constraints_in_parameters.expr: not(scaleOptional is None and offsetOptional is None and deqScale1Optional is None and deqScale2Optional is None and antiquantScale1Optional is None and antiquantScale2Optional is None and antiquantOffset1Optional is None and antiquantOffset2Optional is None) or (x.dtype in ["FLOAT16","BFLOAT16"] and weight1.dtype in ["FLOAT16","BFLOAT16"] and weight2.dtype in ["FLOAT16","BFLOAT16"] and y.dtype in ["FLOAT16","BFLOAT16"])
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 非量化场景不能输入量化参数和伪量化参数，x/weight/y均为FLOAT16/BFLOAT16

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (antiquantScale1Optional is None and antiquantScale2Optional is None and antiquantOffset1Optional is None and antiquantOffset2Optional is None) or (antiquantScale1Optional is not None and antiquantScale2Optional is not None and antiquantOffset1Optional is not None and antiquantOffset2Optional is not None)
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 伪量化场景要求antiquant参数成组提供

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (weight1.dtype not in ["INT8","INT4"]) or ((scaleOptional is not None and offsetOptional is not None and deqScale1Optional is not None and deqScale2Optional is not None) or (antiquantScale1Optional is not None and antiquantScale2Optional is not None))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 量化/伪量化场景需要相应的量化/伪量化参数
NPU feedback: weight1和weight2数据类型必须一致
NPU feedback: 浮点权重模式下y.dtype需与x.dtype一致

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (weight1.dtype in ["INT8","INT4"]) or ((bias1Optional is None or bias1Optional.dtype == "INT32") and (bias2Optional is None or bias2Optional.dtype == "INT32"))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 量化场景bias数据类型为INT32

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (deqScale1Optional is None and deqScale2Optional is None) or ((y.dtype == "FLOAT16" and deqScale1Optional.dtype in ["UINT64","INT64","FLOAT32"] and deqScale2Optional.dtype == deqScale1Optional.dtype) or (y.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and deqScale1Optional.dtype == "BFLOAT16" and deqScale2Optional.dtype == "BFLOAT16"))
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 量化场景deqScale数据类型：y为FLOAT16时支持UINT64/INT64/FLOAT32；y为BFLOAT16时支持BFLOAT16

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (antiquantScale1Optional is None and antiquantOffset1Optional is None) or (G.range_value > 0 and K1.range_value % G.range_value == 0)
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 伪量化场景per-group下，antiquantScale1和antiquantOffset1的组数G要能被K1整除

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (antiquantScale2Optional is None and antiquantOffset2Optional is None) or (G.range_value > 0 and K2.range_value % G.range_value == 0)
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 伪量化场景per-group下，antiquantScale2和antiquantOffset2的组数G要能被K2整除

constraints_in_parameters.expr: M.range_value > 0 and K1.range_value > 0 and N1.range_value > 0 and K2.range_value > 0 and N2.range_value > 0 and E.range_value >= 0 and G.range_value >= 0
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: 维度变量M/K1/N1/K2/N2为正整数，E/G为非负整数

constraints_in_parameters.expr: (len(weight1.shape) == 2 and E.range_value == 0) or (len(weight1.shape) == 3 and E.range_value == weight1.shape[0])
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: weight1为2维时无专家(E=0)，3维时E=weight1.shape[0]

constraints_in_parameters.expr: not(tokensIndexFlag.range_value == True) or (expertTokensOptional is not None)
constraints_in_parameters.src_text: tokensIndexFlag为true时需要传入expertTokensOptional
tokensIndexFlag为false时expertTokensOptional表示各专家token数

description: 如果传入参数是必选输入，输出或者必选属性，且是空指针，则返回161001。
x、weight1、weight2、activation、expertTokensOptional、bias1Optional、bias2Optional、y的数据类型和数据格式不在支持的范围内。
